name: verzus-platform
description: Production-grade rebuild of the VERZUS competitive gaming platform.

scripts.verify: npm run env:check:test && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:boundaries && npm run build
scripts.verify:m2: npm run verify && npm run build-storybook && npm run visual:test
scripts.verify:m3:shell-audit: npm run typecheck && npm run test -- src/components/layout/app-shell/ShellFailureIsolation.test.tsx src/app/m3-shell-audit/page.test.tsx && npm run build && npm run test:m3:shell-audit
scripts.verify:m3: npm run verify && npm run build-storybook && npm run test:m3:shell-audit && npm run test:m3:navigation && npm run visual:m3:test
scripts.m5:verify:foundation: npm run test:m5:foundation && npm run typecheck && npm run check:boundaries && npm run build
scripts.m5:verify:ui: npm run test:m5:foundation && npm run test:m5:ui && npm run typecheck && npm run check:boundaries && npm run build
scripts.m5:verify:technical: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:m5:unit && npm run check:boundaries && npm run build && node scripts/verify-m5.mjs --technical
scripts.m5:verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:boundaries && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:m5 && npm run test:visual:m5 && node scripts/verify-m5.mjs
scripts.verify:m6:6.1: node scripts/verify-m6-6-1.mjs && npx eslint src/features/competitions src/app/\(platform\)/compete --max-warnings=0 && npm run test:m6:6.1 && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:m6:6.2: node scripts/verify-m6-6-2.mjs && npx eslint src/features/competitions src/app/\(platform\)/compete --max-warnings=0 && npm run test:m6:6.2 && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:m6:6.3: node scripts/verify-m6-6-3.mjs && npx eslint src/features/competitions src/app/api/competitions src/app/(platform)/compete --max-warnings=0 && npm run test:m6:6.3 && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:m6:6.4: node scripts/verify-m6-6-4.mjs && npx eslint src/features/competitions src/app/api/competitions 'src/app/(platform)/compete' --max-warnings=0 && npm run test:m6:6.4 && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:m6:6.5: node scripts/verify-m6-6-5.mjs && npx eslint src/features/competitions/entry src/features/competitions/details/ui src/app/api/competitions --max-warnings=0 && npm run test -- src/features/competitions/entry src/features/competitions/details/ui/CompetitionDetailScreen.test.tsx && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:m6:6.6: node scripts/verify-m6-6-6.mjs && npx eslint src/features/competitions/lifecycle src/features/competitions/details/ui src/features/competitions/entry src/app/api/competitions --max-warnings=0 && npm run test:m6:6.6 && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:m6:6.7:technical: node scripts/verify-m6-6-7.mjs --technical-only && eslint src/features/competitions src/app/api/competitions src/app/api/telemetry/competitions src/app/api/health/competitions 'src/app/(platform)/compete' 'src/app/(preview)/m6-competition-review' tests/e2e/m6 tests/integration/m6-competition-release.integration.test.ts tests/visual/m6-competitions.visual.spec.ts playwright.m6.config.ts --max-warnings=0 && npm run test:m6:6.7:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run test:m6:6.7:e2e
scripts.verify:m6:6.7: node scripts/verify-m6-6-7.mjs && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:m6:6.7:e2e && npm run test:m6:6.7:visual
scripts.m6:release: npm run verify:m6:6.7 && npm run m6:artifact
